description: Capabilities the renderer is allowed to use. Locked-down for M02 Stage E: only core (window + ipc) and event listen/emit are granted. The renderer never holds the API key, never speaks HTTP, never touches the filesystem. Every privileged action goes through #[tauri::command]. Per spec §10 capability boundary; CLAUDE.md §15 trap #10 (Tauri allowlist is the security boundary). M04 Stage E adds `notification:default` so the desktop notifier (spec §6a) can surface HITL prompts via the OS notification system. M08 Stage C adds `dialog:allow-open` (the granular per-command permission — narrower than `dialog:default`) for the local-file picker behind the Builder import affordance + the Import panel Browse companion (spec §M7 / M07.V 4).
